overall.description: A cinematic night scene from a fantasy video game depicting a character holding a lantern on a misty lakeshore. Warm campfire light illuminates a small settlement to the left while an ancient stone castle looms through the fog in the distant background, creating a mysterious atmosphere with contrasting blue and orange tones.

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a foggy lakeshore at night, holding a lantern that casts a warm glow on the rocky ground. To the left, a campsite burns with orange firelight, while the right side opens to dark still water. Through the mist, an ancient stone castle is barely visible atop distant cliffs, creating a mysterious fantasy atmosphere. The camera slowly pans across this scenic vista, and briefly a game interaction prompt appears on screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping pan across a misty lakeshore at night, transitioning from the warmth of a small settlement toward the cold mystery of a distant fortress. It begins with a character holding a lantern that casts a soft glow over the rocky ground, while the orange flicker of a nearby campsite illuminates the left side of the frame. As the camera glides across the vista, the scene opens up to reveal the dark, still waters of the lake on the right. The movement then pushes through the dense fog, where the silhouette of an ancient stone castle gradually emerges atop distant cliffs. Finally, the shot lingers on this atmospheric contrast between the cozy firelight and the looming ruins under a deep blue night sky.
